principle: No coding agent may start from a draft, incomplete, stale, or unapproved implementation contract.
agent_boundaries: Agent may change only explicitly allowed repository paths.
Agent must preserve permanent IDs in code, commits, tests, and evidence.
Agent may not resolve product ambiguity by inventing requirements.
Agent may not approve its own Build Pack, QA Pack, security review, or release.
Agent output is implementation evidence, not canonical product authority.
Agent must stop when a source fingerprint changes or a new blocker appears.
